summary: Tested ConciergeButton component on pillar pages and MiraOS Modal. ConciergeButton renders and functions correctly when logged in. Found critical UI issue: ConciergeButton at bottom-right is blocked by MiraChatWidget FAB (same z-index conflict). MiraOS Modal ConciergeButton header variant works correctly with unread badge. Pet name display in DoggyServiceDesk partially working - shows 'member name's pet' when pet_info unavailable.

ui_bugs.issue: Button is blocked/overlapped by MiraChatWidget FAB at bottom-right position. Both have z-[9999] and similar positioning. ConciergeButton at bottom-20 right-4, MiraChatWidget at bottom-4 right-4. Pointer events intercepted.

issues: Pet name shows as '(Member)' when pet_info not available in ticket - this is correct fallback behavior but indicates ticket data may not have pet_info populated

action_items: Fix z-index conflict between ConciergeButton (floating) and MiraChatWidget FAB - both at bottom-right with same z-index
Consider moving ConciergeButton to different position (bottom-left or offset from MiraChatWidget)
Ensure ticket creation APIs populate pet_info properly for better pet name display in Service Desk
critical_code_review_comments: ConciergeButton correctly only renders for logged-in users (line 199: if (!user) return null)
ConciergeButton header variant in MiraOSModal works correctly with unread badge (visible in header next to voice toggle)
MiraOSTrigger at bottom-left correctly opens MiraOS Modal
Pet name logic in DoggyServiceDesk (lines 4470-4480) has proper priority chain: pet_info > petProfile > pet_name > metadata.pet_name > pet_names[0] > subject parse > member name's pet > (Member)
Z-INDEX CONFLICT: ConciergeButton positionConfig 'bottom-right': 'fixed bottom-20 right-4 z-[9999]' overlaps with MiraChatWidget 'fixed bottom-4 right-4 z-[9999]'

success_rate.frontend: 80% - Core features work but floating ConciergeButton blocked by overlap

features_tested.ConciergeButton on pillar pages for logg: PASS with issue - Button renders but blocked by MiraChatWidget
features_tested.ConciergeButton unread count badge: PASS - Shows badge count '1' on header variant
features_tested.ConciergeButton opens ConciergeThreadPan: NOT FULLY TESTED - API 404 errors prevent full flow
features_tested.Pet name in DoggyServiceDesk: PARTIAL - Shows 'member's pet' when pet_info not available, which is correct fallback
features_tested.MiraOSTrigger opens MiraOSModal: PASS - Modal opens correctly with all tabs

context_for_next_testing_agent: ConciergeButton component works but is BLOCKED by MiraChatWidget FAB at bottom-right. Main agent needs to either adjust z-index or position of ConciergeButton. MiraOS Modal header variant ConciergeButton works perfectly. WebSocket errors present but don't affect core UI functionality.
